understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` within the turn limit and available attempts, without dying.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE (e.g., left/right) or CLICK a target tile. Movement shifts the player and then the player is affected by the current gravity (here it was DOWN), causing them to fall until supported, sometimes resulting in multi-tile drops. Clicking removes the chosen clickable tile (it disappears) and can also cause the player to drop immediately due to gravity. Landing on a spike tile ends the attempt/run. Each level allows 2 attempts and each attempt has a fixed number of turns/steps; on failure the level restarts. Undo (when available) would revert prior actions, restoring position/state and previously removed tiles.
